author: RamSet
releaseNotes: 0.7.0 - Cleanup: prefs reduced to IP + 8-digit setup code (port auto-detected, hidden once paired). Removed pair/detectPort/findThermostat commands (pairing auto-runs on Save). Added Raise/Lower Setpoint buttons that write the thermostat setpoint. Default refresh 1 min.
tags: Thermostat, ecobee, HomeKit, HAP, Local, Sensor

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Thermostat
drivers.description: Local HAP controller for ecobee thermostat: mode, setpoints, temperature, humidity, operating state, and all reachable configurable parameters.

drivers.name: Ecobee HAP Remote Sensor
drivers.description: Child device for ecobee remote sensors (temperature, occupancy, motion, battery). Created automatically by the thermostat driver.
